parameters.command:
=# Bulk Processing & Archiving Script
BASE_DIR="/data/output"
PROCESSED_DIR="$BASE_DIR/processed"
LOGS=""

# Helper for logging
log() { LOGS="$LOGS$1\n"; }

# 1. Setup processed folder
mkdir -p "$PROCESSED_DIR"
log "Archiving to: $PROCESSED_DIR"

# 2. Find ALL PDFs and handle spaces in filenames
TMP_LIST="$BASE_DIR/pdf_list_$$.tmp"
find "$BASE_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname "*.pdf" \) > "$TMP_LIST"

if [ ! -s "$TMP_LIST" ]; then
  echo "{\"status\": \"info\", \"msg\": \"No new PDFs found in $BASE_DIR to process.\"}"
  rm -f "$TMP_LIST"
  exit 0
fi

log "Files to process:"
while IFS= read -r line; do log "$line"; done < "$TMP_LIST"

# 3. Process each PDF line by line preventing space-splitting issues
while IFS= read -r PDF_PATH; do
  PDF_FILENAME=$(basename "$PDF_PATH")
  FOLDER_NAME="${PDF_FILENAME%.*}"
  TARGET_DIR="$BASE_DIR/$FOLDER_NAME"
  
  log "--- Processing: $PDF_FILENAME ---"
  
  # 4. Collision Check: Prevent mixing files if folder exists
  if [ -d "$TARGET_DIR" ]; then
    TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
    log "Warning: Folder $FOLDER_NAME already exists. Archiving to ${FOLDER_NAME}_old_$TIMESTAMP"
    mv "$TARGET_DIR" "${TARGET_DIR}_old_$TIMESTAMP"
  fi
  
  mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR"
  
  # 5. Extract (Standard 72 DPI via mutool for < 400KB size)
  if ! mutool draw -r 72 -o "$TARGET_DIR/%d.jpg" "$PDF_PATH" 2>&1; then
    log "ERROR: mutool failed on $PDF_FILENAME. Skipping."
    continue
  fi
  
  # 5. Rename serially (mutool numbered output handles 1.jpg, 2.jpg...)
  cd "$TARGET_DIR"
  for thumb in page-*.jpg; do
    [ -e "$thumb" ] || continue
    num_part=$(echo "$thumb" | sed 's/page-//; s/\.jpg//')
    new_num=$(echo "$num_part" | sed 's/^0*//')
    [ -z "$new_num" ] && new_num="0"
    [ "$thumb" != "$new_num.jpg" ] && mv "$thumb" "$new_num.jpg"
  done
  
  # 6. Archive processed PDF
  mv "$PDF_PATH" "$PROCESSED_DIR/"
  log "Completed and moved to processed/"
done < "$TMP_LIST"

# 7. Final Response
processed_count=$(wc -l < "$TMP_LIST" | awk '{print $1}')
rm -f "$TMP_LIST"
echo "{\"status\": \"success\", \"processed_count\": \"$processed_count\", \"logs\": \"$LOGS\"}"
